assertionResults.fullName: ADS | GET /api/admin/ads TC-ADS-01 | Returns full list of ads with name and playCount
assertionResults.title: TC-ADS-01 | Returns full list of ads with name and playCount

assertionResults.fullName: ADS | GET /api/admin/ads TC-ADS-02 | Returns empty array when no ads exist
assertionResults.title: TC-ADS-02 | Returns empty array when no ads exist

assertionResults.fullName: ADS | POST /api/admin/ads TC-ADS-03 | Valid name + video file creates ad and returns 201
assertionResults.title: TC-ADS-03 | Valid name + video file creates ad and returns 201

assertionResults.fullName: ADS | POST /api/admin/ads TC-ADS-04 | Missing ad name returns 400
assertionResults.title: TC-ADS-04 | Missing ad name returns 400

assertionResults.fullName: ADS | POST /api/admin/ads TC-ADS-05 | Missing video file returns 400
assertionResults.title: TC-ADS-05 | Missing video file returns 400

assertionResults.fullName: ADS | DELETE /api/admin/ads/:id TC-ADS-06 | Deletes existing ad and returns success
assertionResults.title: TC-ADS-06 | Deletes existing ad and returns success

assertionResults.fullName: ADS | DELETE /api/admin/ads/:id TC-ADS-07 | Returns 404 for unknown ad id
assertionResults.title: TC-ADS-07 | Returns 404 for unknown ad id

assertionResults.fullName: ADS | Play Count — PATCH /api/admin/ads/:id/play TC-ADS-08 | Play count increments by 1 and returns new count
assertionResults.title: TC-ADS-08 | Play count increments by 1 and returns new count

assertionResults.fullName: PLAYLIST | GET /api/admin/playlists TC-PL-01 | Returns all playlists with ads count
assertionResults.title: TC-PL-01 | Returns all playlists with ads count

assertionResults.fullName: PLAYLIST | POST /api/admin/playlists TC-PL-02 | Creates playlist with name only — ads and locations are optional
assertionResults.title: TC-PL-02 | Creates playlist with name only — ads and locations are optional

assertionResults.fullName: PLAYLIST | POST /api/admin/playlists TC-PL-03 | Creates playlist with adIds and locationIds stored
assertionResults.title: TC-PL-03 | Creates playlist with adIds and locationIds stored

assertionResults.fullName: PLAYLIST | POST /api/admin/playlists TC-PL-04 | Missing name returns 400
assertionResults.title: TC-PL-04 | Missing name returns 400

assertionResults.fullName: PLAYLIST | DELETE /api/admin/playlists/:id TC-PL-05 | Deletes existing playlist
assertionResults.title: TC-PL-05 | Deletes existing playlist

assertionResults.fullName: PLAYLIST | DELETE /api/admin/playlists/:id TC-PL-06 | Returns 404 for unknown playlist id
assertionResults.title: TC-PL-06 | Returns 404 for unknown playlist id

assertionResults.fullName: PLAYLIST | PATCH /api/admin/playlists/:id TC-PL-07 | Updates name, ads, and locations
assertionResults.title: TC-PL-07 | Updates name, ads, and locations

assertionResults.fullName: PLAYLIST | PATCH /api/admin/playlists/:id TC-PL-08 | Returns 404 when playlist not found during update
assertionResults.title: TC-PL-08 | Returns 404 when playlist not found during update

assertionResults.fullName: TC-01 to TC-04 | POST /api/payment/initiate TC-01 | Rejects amount below minimum ৳10
assertionResults.title: TC-01 | Rejects amount below minimum ৳10

assertionResults.fullName: TC-01 to TC-04 | POST /api/payment/initiate TC-02 | Rejects request when required customer fields are missing
assertionResults.title: TC-02 | Rejects request when required customer fields are missing

assertionResults.fullName: TC-01 to TC-04 | POST /api/payment/initiate TC-03 | Successful initiation returns tran_id and gatewayUrl
assertionResults.title: TC-03 | Successful initiation returns tran_id and gatewayUrl

assertionResults.fullName: TC-01 to TC-04 | POST /api/payment/initiate TC-04 | Returns 502 when SSLCommerz does not return a GatewayPageURL
assertionResults.title: TC-04 | Returns 502 when SSLCommerz does not return a GatewayPageURL

assertionResults.fullName: TC-05 to TC-09 | POST /api/payment/success TC-05 | Redirects to /payment/fail when gateway status is not VALID
assertionResults.title: TC-05 | Redirects to /payment/fail when gateway status is not VALID

assertionResults.fullName: TC-05 to TC-09 | POST /api/payment/success TC-06 | Redirects to /payment/fail when order is not found in DB
assertionResults.title: TC-06 | Redirects to /payment/fail when order is not found in DB

assertionResults.fullName: TC-05 to TC-09 | POST /api/payment/success TC-07 | Already-completed payment is handled idempotently (no double-process)
assertionResults.title: TC-07 | Already-completed payment is handled idempotently (no double-process)

assertionResults.fullName: TC-05 to TC-09 | POST /api/payment/success TC-08 | Validation mismatch marks payment failed and redirects to /payment/fail
assertionResults.title: TC-08 | Validation mismatch marks payment failed and redirects to /payment/fail

assertionResults.fullName: TC-05 to TC-09 | POST /api/payment/success TC-09 | Valid payment marks status as completed and redirects to /payment/success
assertionResults.title: TC-09 | Valid payment marks status as completed and redirects to /payment/success

assertionResults.fullName: TC-10 | POST /api/payment/fail TC-10 | Marks a pending payment as failed and redirects to /payment/fail
assertionResults.title: TC-10 | Marks a pending payment as failed and redirects to /payment/fail

assertionResults.fullName: TC-11 | POST /api/payment/cancel TC-11 | Marks a pending payment as cancelled and redirects to /payment/cancel
assertionResults.title: TC-11 | Marks a pending payment as cancelled and redirects to /payment/cancel

assertionResults.fullName: TC-12 | POST /api/payment/ipn TC-12 | Responds HTTP 200 immediately before any async processing
assertionResults.title: TC-12 | Responds HTTP 200 immediately before any async processing

assertionResults.fullName: TC-13 to TC-14 | GET /api/payment/status/:tran_id TC-13 | Returns 404 when tran_id does not exist in DB
assertionResults.title: TC-13 | Returns 404 when tran_id does not exist in DB

assertionResults.fullName: TC-13 to TC-14 | GET /api/payment/status/:tran_id TC-14 | Returns correct payment data for a known tran_id
assertionResults.title: TC-14 | Returns correct payment data for a known tran_id

assertionResults.fullName: TC-15 | GET /api/payment/history TC-15 | Returns paginated payment list with correct total and page info
assertionResults.title: TC-15 | Returns paginated payment list with correct total and page info
